title: NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Therapist, Multipurpose Worker and More Posts
short_info: National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala) Therapist, Multipurpose Worker and More Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website http://nam.kerala.gov.in.Has been announced through the NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor and ANM Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: Retired Govt. service AYUSH Yoga instructors up to 60 years and experienced candidates up to 50 years considered for Yoga Instructor (Female).

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc or equivalent in Yoga from Govt. recognized AYUSH institution, GNM/ANM with Kerala Nurses and Midwives Council Registration
qualification.details: Therapist, Therapy Assistant: B.Sc or equivalent in Yoga from a Govt. recognized AYUSH institution approved by the National AYUSH Mission. Preference for candidates with one year of experience in Yoga. Multipurpose Worker: GNM/ANM from Kerala Nurses and Midwives Council Registration Certificate.

salary_details.details: Therapist, Therapy Assistant: Rs. 14700/- Per Month Multipurpose Worker: Rs. 15000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAM Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://nam.kerala.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026 is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application fee for NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026. This makes the application process accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. However, there are specific age relaxations mentioned for certain categories in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: For the Yoga Instructor posts, candidates must possess a B.Sc or equivalent degree in Yoga from a Government-recognized AYUSH institution approved by the National AYUSH Mission. Prior experience in Yoga is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification for the ANM/GNM Staff post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the ANM/GNM Staff post is a GNM/ANM certificate along with a valid registration from the Kerala Nurses and Midwives Council.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Yoga Instructor posts is Rs. 14700/- per month, and for the ANM/GNM Staff post, it is Rs. 15000/- per month. These are contractual positions.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves the submission of the application form followed by document verification. Candidates are advised to ensure all their submitted documents are accurate and valid.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for retired government employees?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Yoga Instructor (Female) post, retired Government service AYUSH Yoga instructors are considered up to 60 years, and those with experience are considered up to 50 years.
